section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column (3 assets). Selections are black-filled cells. Value: col1 (Nvidia SP) D, col2 (Nvidia DC) C, col3 (Paypal SP) D. Type of Income: col1+col2 Dividends; col3 None. Amount of Income: col1+col2 B:$1-$200; col3 A:None. Transaction row is a continuous black band with no P/S/E letter - treated as divider/redaction, recorded null.
